4. Eat food in iron vessel.
5. Give articles related to Rahu on Saturday. They are : bfue
and brown cloth. wheat. mirror. til (sesame seeds), oil. iron,
blanket etc.
6. Give chapattl to a black dog on Saturday.
7. Bum google daily at home. Do Bharav or Oevi puja.
8. Do not wear black clothes on saturday.
9. Givejaun (barley} dough balls to fishes or jaun to poor people
on Saturday.
10. Give in charity artides of elephant tooth.
11. Give dan at sun and moon e-clipse time and do mantra japa.
12. Take medicine bath with medJdnes related to Rahu.
13. Keep wheat under a heavy article in a big place.
14. Wash wheat with milk and throw it In a river.
